NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON SEP-09-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 608. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR SEP-26-2011 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON DEC-23-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S AND DEFENDANTS BARNES & NOBLE INC. AND BARBES NOBLE BOOKSELLERS, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THE REFORMULATION AND WARNING PROVISIONS ARE REASONABLE AND COMPLIANT WITH THE LAW. THE FEES AND PENALTY PROVISIONS ARE REASONABLE. ORDER AND JUGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
